s: A health tracking app that respects your privacy
d:
Albi is a privacy-focused health tracking app that keeps all your data on your device.

Features:
- Track your weight, blood pressure, visceral fat, and other health metrics
- View your progress with beautiful charts
- Export and backup your data locally
- No cloud services or account required
- No tracking or analytics
- Fully open source

Your health data stays on your device. No accounts, no cloud sync, no tracking.
